'''samocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yagiite|yagiite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-m-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yagiite|yagiite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| samocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæmecheth|sæmecheth]] || [[word:sæmechej|sæmechej]] || [[word:sæmechesh|sæmechesh]] || [[word:sæmeche|sæmeche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:samomochoth|samomochoth]] || [[word:samomochoj|samomochoj]] || [[word:samomochosh|samomochosh]] || [[word:samomocho|samomocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:samochoth|samochoth]] || [[word:samochoj|samochoj]] || [[word:samochosh|samochosh]] || [[word:samocho|samocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:samofchoth|samofchoth]] || [[word:samofchoj|samofchoj]] || [[word:samofchosh|samofchosh]] || [[word:samofchof|samofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:samochotho|samochotho]] || [[word:samochojo|samochojo]] || [[word:samochosho|samochosho]] || [[word:samochoko|samochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:samochoth|samochoth]] || [[word:samochoj|samochoj]] || [[word:samochosh|samochosh]] || [[word:samocho|samocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:samochothol|samochothol]] || [[word:samochojol|samochojol]] || [[word:samochoshol|samochoshol]] || [[word:samochokol|samochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:samochothotho|samochothotho]] || [[word:samochojojo|samochojojo]] || [[word:samochoshosho|samochoshosho]] || [[word:samochoko|samochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:samochothon|samochothon]] || [[word:samochojon|samochojon]] || [[word:samochoshon|samochoshon]] || [[word:samochokon|samochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:samochothoro|samochothoro]] || [[word:samochojoro|samochojoro]] || [[word:samochoshoro|samochoshoro]] || [[word:samochokoro|samochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
